seo_title: AI System Keeps Warehouse Robot Traffic Running Smoothly
meta_description: A new AI system developed by MIT and Symbotic can optimize warehouse robot traffic, increasing throughput by 25% while adapting to changing conditions.
body_html:
The new AI system can optimize warehouse robot traffic, increasing throughput by 25% while adapting to changing conditions.

How it WorksUtilizes deep reinforcement learning to figure out which robots should be prioritizedFasts and reliable planning algorithm feeds instructions to the robotsEnables robots to respond rapidly in constantly changing conditionsSimulation ResultsMethodThroughput GainThis new approach25%Other methodsN/AAdaptability and ScalabilityThe system can quickly adapt to new environments with different quantities of robots or varied warehouse layouts.

source.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
source.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
